caption: A man with light-colored, spiked hair and glasses sits in a podcast studio, facing right. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red and white bowtie, and light-colored suspenders. Large over-ear headphones are positioned on his head, and a black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, a framed picture hangs on the wall, and a display for "UNIQUE FASHIONS" is visible, featuring a woman in a green dress. Red and white logos appear on the screen, featuring the text "#REAL TALK PODCAST" on the left and "REAL TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated in a stable position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking toward the right side of the frame.
